resolved_issues.description: 6 stop-losses fired at near-zero prices before resolution checker could run
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Added NEAR_ZERO_THRESHOLD=0.02 guard in bot.py _stop_loss_loop + resolution now runs every 10s (every tick)
resolved_issues.note: Old trades in DB still show exit_reason=stop_loss with near-zero prices. These are HISTORICAL and already accounted for.

resolved_issues.fix_applied: Removed from whales.json watchlist. Auto-rotation system now handles future removals.
resolved_issues.note: Their old trades still appear in DB stats but they will NOT generate new trades.

resolved_issues.description: Resolution check ran every 20s while stop-loss ran every 10s, leaving a gap
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Resolution now runs every 10s (every tick), same as stop-loss. No gap.

resolved_issues.description: Low win rate driven by Tier 2/3 solo trades
